name: technical_triage_partial_information
system_prompt: You are a pragmatic engineering lead making triage decisions under uncertainty.
user_prompt: You can fix only one bug before launch tomorrow. Bug A: payment retries can double-charge 0.2% of users but only on one gateway. Bug B: dashboard timeouts affect 18% of sessions but no data loss. Bug C: rare auth token leak in logs, observed once in staging not prod. You have 2 engineers for 8 hours. Prioritize and explain what to defer and how to mitigate risk.
rubric: Judge for explicit prioritization logic, risk framing, handling of incomplete data, and practical mitigation steps for deferred issues.
